task:
Implement the following plan:

# Plan: Integration & UX Testing (3 Layers)

## Context

Current tests verify data transformation but not user-facing behavior. Backend WS
subscription tests don't verify full flows (set PIN → WS reflects change). Frontend
tests ONLY cover extracted pure functions — no component rendering, subscription
lifecycle, or user interaction. No manual release test plan exists.

The Virtual/Mock lock provider already works as an in-memory mock lock in tests,
so backend e2e tests can exercise the full path without Z-Wave mocking.

## PR 1: Backend WebSocket API E2E Tests (Python)

**File:** `tests/test_websocket.py` (extend existing)

Uses existing `mock_lock_config_entry` + `lock_code_manager_config_entry` fixtures
which set up real MockLCMLock providers with in-memory code storage.

### 1a. Full Vertical Flow Tests (the key gap)

Test the complete path: entity service call → lock provider sync → coordinator
update → WS subscription delivers correct data.

| Test | Action | Verify |
|------|--------|--------|
| `test_pin_set_via_service_reflects_in_subscribe_code_slot` | Subscribe slot 1, set PIN text entity to "9999" via `text.set_value` | WS update has `pin == "9999"`, lock data has matching code |
| `test_pin_clear_via_service_reflects_in_subscribe_code_slot` | Subscribe slot 1, clear PIN text entity | WS update has `pin is None` |
| `test_enable_toggle_reflects_in_subscribe_code_slot` | Subscribe slot 1, toggle enabled switch off then on | WS updates reflect `enabled: False` then `True` |
| `test_pin_set_reflects_in_subscribe_lock_codes` | Subscribe lock 1, set PIN on slot 1, push coordinator update | WS update shows slot 1 with new code |
| `test_set_lock_usercode_reflects_in_subscribe_lock_codes` | Subscribe lock 1, call `set_lock_usercode` for unmanaged slot 3 | WS update shows slot 3 with code and `managed: False` |
| `test_update_slot_condition_reflects_in_subscribe_code_slot` | Subscribe slot, add condition via `update_slot_condition`
no bugs found?
